## What does this PR do?
<!-- 1–3 sentences describing the change. Link the feature/bug. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — New feature
- [ ] fix — Bug fix
- [ ] chore — Config / setup
- [ ] docs — Documentation
- [ ] refactor — No behavior change

## Linked Issue
Closes #

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows naming conventions (see GOVERNANCE.md)
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] No business logic in controllers / no req/res in services
- [ ] New API endpoints have Zod validator + test
- [ ] Shared types used from `packages/shared` (no duplicates)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] `console.log` removed (use `logger`)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] No post-MVP features snuck in (check MVP_SCOPE.md)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format
